response.global_analysis: The video features spoken messages from Ichijou Ririka and other Hololive members over background music. No vocal singing was detected, which is consistent with the Reference JSON. I have transcribed and translated the spoken lines, ensuring that timestamps are strictly synchronized with the vocal audio waveforms. Adhering to the 'Golden Rule' that audio dictates timing and that subtitles should not be output without vocal audio driving them, I have omitted the hashtag title and the final static written message as they are not accompanied by speech or vocals.

subtitles.original: …と思って、思ってるので、楽しんでもらえると嬉しいです！
subtitles.english: ...so I hope you all enjoy it!

subtitles.original: じゃあみんな、今日来てくれて本当ありがとね！
subtitles.english: So everyone, thank you so much for coming today!

subtitles.original: このあともゆっくり楽しんでね！バイバイ！
subtitles.english: Keep enjoying the rest of the show! Bye-bye!

subtitles.original: バイバーイ！ありがとー！
